title: Retrying vs Resampling in AI Control
summary: Retrying vs Resampling in AI Control
whyItMatters: We’ve just released a new paper: Retrying vs Resampling in AI Control . We revisit the resampling protocols introduced in Ctrl-Z with an up-to-date setting and much stronger models, and compare them against “retrying” protocols similar to Claude Code auto mode or Codex Auto-review. Motivation Roughly a year ago we released Ctrl-Z , the first paper to study…
